html:
Exclusive to:

The Seed of Ruin is an item exclusive to Don't Starve and its DLCs that allows you to completely regenerate the Caves. It is dropped by the Ancient Guardian.

To use it, go to the Surface and use it on a Sinkhole. Afterwards, a message will appear to confirm the complete change of the Caves. If agree, the Caves will be regenerated. This item essentially makes everything in the Caves, as well as the Ruins, renewable.

Unlike the ruins regeneration in Don't Starve Together, the Seed of Ruin completely regenerates the caves to a different seed, as well as the Ruins.

Trivia

  • The Seed of Ruin was added in the April 27th, 2023 Don't Starve Mega Update update.
    • For Worlds created before the update, where the Ancient Guardian is already dead, will have a Seed of Ruin appearing somewhere in the ruins.
  • The seed completely regenerates caves with ruins, which means that items left inside will be deleted (even non-deletable ones such as the Eye Bone).

Gallery

  • Seed of Ruin Map Icon.


Tools and WeaponsResources

Seed of Ruin
Does not stack
Perk
Regenerates the Caves as well as the Ruins
Dropped by
"cave_regenerator"
Exclusive to:
“I feel a strangely magnetic pull towards the cave entrance.”
–Wilson
“Why do I feel like I should bring it back to the entrance?”
–Willow
“Want Wolfgang to bring you back to cave opening?”
–Wolfgang
“It yearns to be brought to the cave’s entrance.”
–Wendy
“INSTALL AT CAVE OPENING”
–WX-78
“What might transpire if it came in contact with the cave’s entrance, I wonder?”
–Wickerbottom
“Why do I feel like I should bring it to the entrance, eh?”
–Woodie
“A return to the beginning. I should leave it at the cave entrance.”
–Maxwell
“I hypothesize it will have an interesting reaction with the caves’ entrance.”
–Wagstaff
“It wishes return tö the entrance.”
–Wigfrid
“We should bring it back to the opening! We have a feeling!”
–Webber
“I wonder what would happen if I brought this to the entrance?”
–Walani
“It wants to be fed to the mouth of the cave.”
–Warly
“Got a funny feelin’ about bringin’ it back to the mouth o’this cave.”
–Woodlegs
“IT BESEECHETH WILBA BRING IT TO YONDER CAVE OPENING”
–Wilba
“Bring to opening? Okay!”
–Wormwood
“I think I’ll bring it back to the entrance, see what happens.”
–Wheeler
The Seed of Ruin is an item exclusive to Don't Starve and its DLCs that allows you to completely regenerate the Caves. It is dropped by the Ancient Guardian.
To use it, go to the Surface and use it on a Sinkhole. Afterwards, a message will appear to confirm the complete change of the Caves. If agree, the Caves will be regenerated. This item essentially makes everything in the Caves, as well as the Ruins, renewable.
Unlike the ruins regeneration in Don't Starve Together, the Seed of Ruin completely regenerates the caves to a different seed, as well as the Ruins.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Seed of Ruin was added in the April 27th, 2023 Don't Starve Mega Update update.
For Worlds created before the update, where the Ancient Guardian is already dead, will have a Seed of Ruin appearing somewhere in the ruins.
The seed completely regenerates caves with ruins, which means that items left inside will be deleted (even non-deletable ones such as the Eye Bone).

The Seed of Ruin is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' and its [[DLC]]s that allows you to completely regenerate the [[Caves]]. It is dropped by the [[Ancient Guardian]]. 

To use it, go to the [[Surface World|Surface]] and use it on a [[Sinkhole]]. Afterwards, a message will appear to confirm the complete change of the Caves. If agree, the Caves will be regenerated. This item essentially makes everything in the Caves, as well as the [[Ruins]], renewable.

Unlike the ruins regeneration in ''Don't Starve Together'', the Seed of Ruin completely regenerates the caves to a different seed, as well as the Ruins.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==

* The Seed of Ruin was added in the April 27th, 2023 ''[[Don't Starve Mega Update]]'' update.
** For Worlds created before the update, where the Ancient Guardian is already dead, will have a Seed of Ruin appearing somewhere in the ruins.
* The seed completely regenerates caves with ruins, which means that items left inside will be deleted (even non-deletable ones such as the [[Eye Bone]]).
